creator: herbert@gojira.at
text:
Sorry, here is the patch:

diff -ruN x11-wm/echinus.bak/Makefile x11-wm/echinus/Makefile
--- x11-wm/echinus.bak/Makefile	2011-08-20 22:22:52.000000000 +0200
+++ x11-wm/echinus/Makefile	2011-08-20 22:23:07.000000000 +0200
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #

 PORTNAME=	echinus
-PORTVERSION=	0.4.3.2
+PORTVERSION=	0.4.7
 CATEGORIES=	x11-wm
 MASTER_SITES=	http://plhk.ru/static/echinus/

diff -ruN x11-wm/echinus.bak/distinfo x11-wm/echinus/distinfo
--- x11-wm/echinus.bak/distinfo	2011-08-20 22:22:52.000000000 +0200
+++ x11-wm/echinus/distinfo	2011-08-20 22:23:14.000000000 +0200
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (echinus-0.4.3.2.tar.gz) =
bf41fef15b1d68c91af8f3ad636156e146dd9837638acc174048f58fe9761f3e
-SIZE (echinus-0.4.3.2.tar.gz) = 30453
+SHA256 (echinus-0.4.7.tar.gz) =
174da785d6f60bf50734f106a137654c2c98c3f2aaccc47649f37777491f74c9
+SIZE (echinus-0.4.7.tar.gz) = 32576
diff -ruN x11-wm/echinus.bak/files/patch-config.mk
x11-wm/echinus/files/patch-config.mk
--- x11-wm/echinus.bak/files/patch-config.mk	2011-08-20 22:22:52.000000000 +0200
+++ x11-wm/echinus/files/patch-config.mk	2011-08-20 22:32:40.000000000 +0200
@@ -1,17 +1,18 @@
-diff -Naur ./config.mk ../echinus-0.3.8/config.mk
---- ./config.mk	2009-11-07 22:00:00.000000000 +0100
-+++ ../echinus-0.3.8/config.mk	2009-11-07 22:01:52.000000000 +0100
-@@ -6,10 +6,10 @@
- # paths
- PREFIX = /usr/local
- MANPREFIX = ${PREFIX}/share/man
--CONF = /share/examples/echinus
-+CONF = ${PREFIX}/etc/echinus/
+--- config.mk.bak	2011-08-20 22:30:29.000000000 +0200
